generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
namespace rdfs = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"

instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for autonomous vehicle perception",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARDataTransmission
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors measuring vehicle speed, steering angle, and position",
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmission
]

instance LiDARDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance RawLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data transmitted over Wi-Fi using UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed and position transmitted via UDP",
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmission,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud clustering",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Preprocessing service for clustering and tracking objects from LiDAR point clouds",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computations from vehicle ECUs",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for processing sensor data to support real-time visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote operation and management of ACC system",
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization,
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingVisualization,
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedPathVisualization
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC system computations including lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and command generation",
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection,
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedCalculation,
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to control ACC settings and issue emergency commands",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC,
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACC,
    DTDFVocab:provides SetDesiredSpeed,
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBraking
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of current vehicle speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ObjectTrackingVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of predicted driving paths based on ACC computations"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for adaptive cruise control"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ACCCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of commands for throttle, brake, and steering control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disable Adaptive Cruise Control system",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set target speed for adaptive cruise control",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command to vehicle",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity hosting sensors, actuators, compute resources, and Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking functionality"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity hardware component for interface operations"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity hardware component for processing and simulation"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component of the User Interface FE"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel component of the User Interface FE"
]

instance Actuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators for vehicle control (throttle, brake, steering)"
]

instance AutomotiveEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Automotive environment containing all system components",
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity, LiDARSensor, VehicleStateSensor, Actuator, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Motor Actuation and Steering Servo are transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP, processed by the Data Translation component for serialization and unit conversion. The ACC Controlling FE handles command execution and data translation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages. The system comprises three entities: User Entity (with split User Interface subcomponents), Digital Twin Entity (data management and control), and Physical Twin Entity (resource-specific functionality including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), each deployed on distinct hardware. Not all ISO 23247 FEs were utilized, and Data Storage lacked a naturally aligned FE."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security protocols are not specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin system into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within each entity may implement OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control, as per the standard's implementation example."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "ISO 26262-1:2018 specifies a hazard analysis and risk assessment (HARA) process to identify potential hazards, determine Automotive Safety Integrity Levels (ASILs), and establish safety goals with corresponding requirements for safety-critical systems. It mandates systematic validation and verification procedures, including fail-safe mechanisms to mitigate risks from systematic and random hardware failures throughout the vehicle's operational lifecycle."
]
